name: Chili Con Carne with Chili Cheddar Shortcakes
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Cold unsalted butter (cut into bits)
1/4 pound Sharp cheddar cheese, grated coarse (about 1 1/2 cups)
4 (2-inch) Pickled jalapeño chili peppers, seeded and minced (wear rubber gloves)
3 pounds Boneless beef chuck (ground coarse in batches)
1 tablespoon Dried hot red pepper flakes or to taste
19 ounces Can kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the shortcake biscuits: In a bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Add the butter and blend until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. Stir in the grated cheddar cheese and jalapeño pepper mixture (minced with rubber gloves).
3. Mix in the sour cream until combined.
4. Make the chili con carne: In a large pot or kettle, cook the onions in oil over medium heat until softened.
5. Add garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes more.
6. Add carrots and cook for another 3-4 minutes.
7. Brown the beef chuck in batches over high heat, then add chili powder, cumin, paprika, organic blend, and red pepper flakes (to taste).
8. Stir in tomato sauce, broth, and vinegar, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
9. Add kidney beans and green bell peppers, cooking for an additional 10-15 minutes or until beef is fully cooked.
10. Serve hot chili con carne over the prepared shortcake biscuits.
